overall.description: A third-person perspective from a video game shows a female character with long braided hair exploring a lush tropical cliffside overlooking calm waters. The scene features dense green vegetation, rocky coastal formations, and an overcast sky creating a serene, atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical cliffside overlook above calm water

agents.ego_description: slowly walking along the grassy cliff edge while observing the water and distant rock formations

entered.detail: large weathered rock formations rising from the water along the left coastline
cluster of palm trees growing on the cliffside behind the character
isolated rocky peak standing in the water at the center of the view
tranquil body of water reflecting the gray sky between the cliffs
dense green bushes and grass covering the cliff edge in the immediate foreground

segments.scene_description: The character explores a lush tropical cliffside covered in dense green vegetation, overlooking a calm body of water surrounded by rocky formations. Palm trees grow on the right while large rock cliffs rise across the water to the left, all under an overcast sky creating soft, diffused lighting across the serene natural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a lush tropical cliffside that overlooks a serene coastal expanse. It begins by tracking the character as she navigates through dense green vegetation, with palm trees framing the right side of the view. As the camera advances, the perspective opens up to reveal a calm body of water punctuated by jagged rocky formations. The scene then expands to show large rock cliffs rising across the water to the left, all bathed in the soft, diffused lighting of an overcast sky.
